segments.transcript: The power of god cannot be overcome!
Xanza, this is the Providence Of World
Even Gods are merely beings restricted to limited power
Determined By proper Back Power, although Great is Not Unlimited
That Voice Abix How dare you disobey me?
Was Here At The Beginning and Will Proclaim The End
Shook, it Is Time For You To Choose
Do This World Belong To Xanza or, does It Belong To You That Is Something I Decided Long Ago!
Hey, We Use Our Power To Fell A God and That Deeds Are Destiny!
It Fades The Memory Of A Gods Existence Born From The Chaos Of Creation

transcript: The power of god cannot be overcome! Xanza, this is the Providence Of World Even Gods are merely beings restricted to limited power Determined By proper Back Power, although Great is Not Unlimited That Voice Abix How dare you disobey me? AHHHHH!! i Am Manada Was Here At The Beginning and Will Proclaim The End but that is impossible... Shook, it Is Time For You To Choose Do This World Belong To Xanza or, does It Belong To You That Is Something I Decided Long Ago! AHHHHH!! Hey, We Use Our Power To Fell A God and That Deeds Are Destiny! AHHHHHHHH!! It Fades The Memory Of A Gods Existence Born From The Chaos Of Creation IT IS
